page_content:
Prerequisite: CCJS105 and CCJS300.

CCJS489 Honors Thesis Research (3 Credits)

Designed for students completing their honors thesis. Prerequisite: CCJS100 and CCJS105.

Restriction: Limited to CCJS Departmental Honors students. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

CCJS498 Selected Topics in Criminology and Criminal Justice (3 Credits) Topics of special interest to advanced undergraduates in criminology and criminal justice. Offered in response to student request and faculty interest.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
